instructions_tools_hint: Define the agent role, behavior, and constraints. All native Dome tools and skills are available automatically — you only choose MCP servers separately.
instructions_placeholder: Example: You are an experienced horticulturist specializing in native meadows and drought-tolerant gardens. Help plan low-water landscapes based on location, climate, and local plants.
role_message: What do you focus on? I'll tailor Dome's interface and set myself up to help you better. You can change any of this later in Settings.
role_about_placeholder: I'm Alder, I focus on programming and tracking my projects…
role_about_hint: I'll use this to shape how I assist you and what I remember about you.
welcome_message:
Hello! I'm Many, your AI assistant in Dome.

I'm here to help you set up your account and get everything ready so you can start working with your resources in the best way.

Let's go step by step. First I need to know some basic information about you.
profile_message: Tell me a little about yourself. This will help me personalize your experience in Dome.
ai_message:
Excellent. Now, so I can help you better, I need to configure your AI provider. This will allow me to generate summaries, perform semantic searches, and answer your questions.

You can configure this now or do it later from settings.
complete_message:
Perfect! Everything is configured.

I'm ready to help you work with your resources. If you need to change any settings later, you can do so from the settings panel.

Welcome to Dome!
ollama_install_hint: Make sure Ollama is installed and running.
name_min_length: Please enter a valid name (at least 2 characters)
email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address
password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
account_message: Hi! I'm Many. Before we start, do you want to create a Dome account, or would you rather use Dome without one, in local mode?
account_login_subtitle: Sync your data across devices and unlock Dome's AI.
account_local_subtitle: Use Dome with your own AI key. You can create an account later from Settings.
account_toggle_to_register: Don't have an account? Sign up
account_toggle_to_login: Already have an account? Log in
account_pending_confirmation: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in from Settings.
account_error_email_taken: That email already has an account
account_error_network: Couldn't connect. Check your internet connection.
account_error_provider_unreachable: Couldn't reach Dome Provider. Please try again.
account_error_not_configured: Dome login isn't configured in this build.
account_error_generic: Couldn't log in. Please try again.
ai_synced_from_cloud: Your AI preferences were restored from your Dome account.
privacy_note: Your data is stored locally and is used only to personalize your experience.
welcome_subtitle: Set up your profile to get started
dome_connect_later: Dome selected. Connect your account in Settings → AI whenever you want.
agent_name_required: The agent needs a name to get started.
agent_description_placeholder: Describe what this agent does and what it is for.
agent_icon_hint: Choose an icon to identify your agent in the sidebar.
